name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA) Standard Terms, allowing two parties to exchange confidential information for a stated purpose.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement - Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, used to complete party details, purpose, term, and governing law before signing.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) Standard Terms for a provider to license a cloud-hosted product or service to a customer.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement, granting early access to a product to a partner in exchange for feedback during a product development program.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA) Standard Terms defining uptime targets, response times, and service credits for a cloud service.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) Standard Terms governing statements of work, deliverables, and fees for professional services engagements.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) Standard Terms addressing the processing of personal data, subprocessors, and international data transfers.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement Standard Terms for licensing installable software from a provider to a customer.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement Standard Terms covering mutual business obligations, trademark licensing, and other partnership terms between two companies.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement Standard Terms for a customer to evaluate a provider's product during a fixed pilot period before entering a definitive agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) Standard Terms for HIPAA-covered entities and business associates handling protected health information (PHI).

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum Standard Terms supplementing a product agreement with terms governing AI/ML features, model training, and AI-generated output.
